title: Solar Requirement IR v1 (Draft)
description: Canonical Requirement Intermediate Representation. All requirement facts and only requirement facts — no derived PRD/contract/DAG content, only artifact_refs. Secret-like property names are rejected at schema level.

id.description: Unique IR identifier, typically the sprint-id or a req-<hex> generated by the router.

source.description: The input adapter that produced this IR. Determines which field-fill strategy was applied.

type.description: Requirement class. 'research' mandates non-empty evidence_refs. 'strategy' implies cross-sprint architectural scope.

problem.description: Problem statement: what is broken or missing and why it matters.

goals.description: Ordered list of goals. Must contain at least one item.

non_goals.description: Explicitly out-of-scope items. May be empty but must be declared.

user_stories.description: At least one user story required.

acceptance.description: Acceptance criteria. Each item must have a stable id (A1, A2, ...) and be mapped to at least one validation target or gate.

constraints.description: Hard constraints (C1, C2, ...). May be empty but must be declared.

risks.description: Risk register entries. May be empty but must be declared.

planner_handoff.description: Mandatory PM → Planner routing specification. No raw-request → builder bypass allowed.

evidence_refs.description: Evidence references. Must be non-empty when type=='research'.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the IR was first created.

compiled_from.description: Path or identifier of the upstream source file or input (e.g., path to prd.md, sprint-id, 'stdin').

compiled_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the compiler last ran and produced this IR.

artifact_refs.description: Optional refs to derived artifacts. IR stores refs, not content.

open_questions.description: Open questions that block or complicate compilation.

then.errorMessage: research-type IR must have at least one evidence_ref entry.

id.description: Stable acceptance ID: A1, A2, A3, ...

mapped_to.description: List of gate IDs, node IDs, or validation targets this criterion maps to. Must be non-empty in compiled IR.

target_role.description: The role that receives this IR. Must be 'planner' or 'architect' — never 'builder'.

mode.description: Dispatch mode hint for the planner.

stop_rules.description: Conditions under which the planner must stop and escalate rather than proceeding.

non_negotiables.description: Hard constraints the planner cannot override. Must include at least 'no raw-request -> builder bypass'.

path.description: Local filesystem path to the evidence artifact.

title.description: Human-readable title for the evidence item.

claim_ids.description: Claims in acceptance[] this evidence supports.
